title: Raytolfas Scoreboard
description: Raytolfas Scoreboard – a Minecraft plugin that adds a customizable scoreboard to display player stats like kills and deaths.
body:
# **Raytolfas Scoreboard development has been discontinued.**

## Raytolfas Scoreboard
Raytolfas Scoreboard is a powerful and customizable plugin for Minecraft servers that enhances the gameplay experience by displaying essential player statistics in a visually appealing and informative way.

### Features
Customizable Scoreboard: Easily adjust the scoreboard design and content via the config file.
Player Statistics: Track and display stats such as kills, deaths, and more in real-time.
Dynamic Updates: Automatically updates as players interact on the server.
Lightweight and Efficient: Optimized for minimal impact on server performance.
User-Friendly Config: Simple configuration options allow admins to tailor the plugin to their server's theme and requirements.
Why Choose Raytolfas Scoreboard?
Raytolfas Scoreboard provides server owners with an engaging way to showcase player progress and competition. Whether you're running a survival, PvP, or mini-game server, this plugin adds a polished touch to the user experience.
